news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Bluemonte ETF Suite

overview.description: The Bluemonte Global Equity ETF (BINT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is a fund-of-funds with broad exposure to the global equity market. It is an actively managed portfolio utilizing a top-down and bottom-up approach to security selection. BINT was launched on Jun 20, 2025 and is issued by Bluemonte.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Bluemonte ETF Suite
data.text: OKLAHOMA CITY , June 25, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Exchange Traded Concepts (ETC), a leader in providing innovative ETF solutions, is delighted to introduce the new lineup of Bluemonte ETFs: Bluemonte Dyna...
